title: Systems and methods for integrated marketing
abstract: Systems, methods, and devices for integrated marketing are disclosed herein. An integrated marketing system may include an integrated marketing device receiving media content from a content provider device. The integrated marketing device attaches one or more product tags to the video content based on elements within the video content. The one or more attached product tags are provided to a consumer or to the content provider device for display on a consumer device.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A system comprising: an integrated marketing device receiving media content from a content provider device, wherein the integrated marketing device attaches one or more product tags to the video content based on elements within the video content, and wherein the one or more attached product tags are provided to a consumer or to the content provider device for display on a consumer device. 2. The system of claim 1, wherein one or more of the attached product tags contain a link to a merchant device. 3. The system of claim 2, wherein the link to the merchant device identifies a particular product. 4. The system of claim 3, wherein the integrated marketing device provides the particular product for purchase to the consumer device for display on the consumer device. 5. The system of claim 1, wherein attaching the one or more product tags to the video content based on elements within the video content is performed manually by associating a particular element with a particular time of the video content. 6. The system of claim 1, wherein attaching the one or more product tags to the video content based on elements within the video content is performed by a neural network. 7. The system of claim 6, wherein the neural network incorporates artificial intelligence. 8. The system of claim 7, wherein the neural network identifies elements within the video content that are associated with products offered through a merchant device. 9. The system of claim 8, wherein based on the identification of the elements, the neural network associates the one or more product tags with the video content. 10. The system of claim 9, wherein the association of the one or more product tags with the video content is displayed at a point in the video content that corresponds with the element being displayed in the video content. 11. A non-transitory computer readable storage medium containing instructions which when executed by a processor cause the processor to perform a method, a method comprising: receiving, by an integrated marketing device, media content from a content provider device; attaching, by the integrated marketing device, one or more product tags to the video content based on elements within the video content; and providing, by the integrated marketing device, the one or more attached product tags to a consumer or to the content provider device for display on a consumer device. 12. The non-transitory computer readable storage medium of claim 11, the method further comprising: providing, by the integrated marketing device, a link to a merchant device. 13. The non-transitory computer readable storage medium of claim 12, the wherein the link to the merchant device identifies a particular product. 14. The non-transitory computer readable storage medium of claim 13, wherein the integrated marketing device provides the particular product to the consumer device for display on the consumer device. 15. The non-transitory computer readable storage medium of claim 11, the method further comprising: attaching, by the integrated marketing device, one or more product tags to the video content based on elements within the video content is performed manually by associating a particular element with a particular time of the video content. 16. The non-transitory computer readable storage medium of claim 11, the method further comprising: attaching, by the integrated marketing device, one or more product tags to the video content based on elements within the video content is performed by a neural network associated with the integrated marketing device. 17. The non-transitory computer readable storage medium of claim 16, wherein the neural network incorporates artificial intelligence. 18. A method, comprising: receiving, by an integrated marketing device, media content from a content provider device; attaching, by the integrated marketing device, one or more product tags to the video content based on elements within the video content; and providing, by the integrated marketing device, the one or more attached product tags to a consumer or to the content provider device for display on a consumer device. 19. The method of claim 18, further comprising: attaching, by the integrated marketing device, one or more product tags to the video content based on elements within the video content is performed manually by associating a particular element with a particular time of the video content. 20. The method of claim 18, further comprising: attaching, by the integrated marketing device, one or more product tags to the video content based on elements within the video content is performed by a neural network artificial intelligence associated with the integrated marketing device.
